description_long: This house features a modern, minimalist rectangular structure with a flat roof and clean, geometric lines. The exterior is predominantly white or light gray, with a prominent entryway accessed by a straight set of steps leading up to a small porch. A large, blooming cherry blossom tree with pink flowers stands adjacent to the house, providing a striking natural contrast to the building's stark simplicity. The house appears to have minimal visible windows, emphasizing privacy and a monolithic appearance. Two benches are placed near the tree, suggesting a small outdoor seating area. The overall setting evokes a tranquil, contemporary urban residence with a focus on simplicity and integration with nature.
description: A modern, flat-roofed house with a minimalist white exterior, accented by a large cherry blossom tree and outdoor benches. The entryway is accessed by a straight staircase, and the design emphasizes clean lines and simplicity.
description_view_0: Front view showing the entry steps, main door, cherry blossom tree, and two benches.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the flat roof, the full spread of the cherry blossom tree, and the linear arrangement of the steps.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the solid, windowless back of the house and the tree behind it.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the house's length, the tree, and the steps extending outward.
attribute_window_arrangement: minimal, few or no visible windows
attribute_entryway_design: Straight steps leading to a recessed entry with a small porch, minimal ornamentation, and no overhang
